Crea fibonnaci en javascript en este directorio para aprender el algoritmo y ver el codigo de manera recursiva
Crea juego de mario karn en 3d

Build a 3D Mario Kart-style racing game using Three.js. Requirements: at least 3 race tracks, a character select screen with 4 drivers, power-ups, AI opponents, and split-screen multiplayer controls. Add a main menu, lap counter, and minimap. Include physics for drifting and item boxes.
